zh.lifeSummary: 當Felicite von Brienne於1129年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登奧布巴-素-時，她的父親Comte Gautier II de Brienne34歲，母親Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont28歲。她和Geoffroi de Joinville III至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Felicite von Brienne于1129年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登奧布巴-素-时，她的父亲Comte Gautier II de Brienne34岁，母亲Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont28岁。她和Geoffroi de Joinville III至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Felicite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the abstract noun denoting luck or good fortune (via Old French from Latin felicitas; compare Felix ), first used as a given name in the 17th century. It also represents the English form of the Late Latin personal name Felicitas, which was borne by several early saints, notably a slave who was martyred in 203 together with her mistress Perpetua and several other companions.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified spelling of   John   or a short form of   Jonathan .  The name is borne by the Canadian singer  Jon Vickers  (  b. 1926 ) and the American actor  Jon Voight  (  b. 1938 ).

variants.name: Jonathan
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘God has given’, composed of the same elements as those of   Matthew  , but in reverse order. This is the name of several characters in the Bible, most notably a son of King Saul, who was a devoted friend and supporter of the young David, even when David and Saul were themselves at loggerheads (1 Samuel 31; 2 Samuel 1:19–26). The name is often taken as symbolic of steadfast friendship and loyalty. Well-known bearers of the name include the Irish clergyman and writer  Jonathan Swift  (  1667-1745 ), British theatre director  Jonathan Miller  (  b. 1934 ), British actor  Jonathan Pryce  (  b. 1947 ), and British television presenter  Jonathan Ross  (  b. 1960 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Felicite von Brienne was born in 1129, in Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, her father, Comte Gautier II de Brienne, was 34 and her mother, Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont, was 28. She had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Geoffroi de Joinville III.

historicEvents.description: Bar-sur-Seine est érigée en commune en 1231. À partir de 1630, les maires sont nommés par le roi : ils deviennent maires perpétuels et lieutenant général de police.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Felicite von Brienne est née en 1129, à Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Comte Gautier II de Brienne, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont, avait 28 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Geoffroi de Joinville III.

de.lifeSummary: Als Felicite von Brienne 1129 in Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Comte Gautier II de Brienne 34 und ihre Mutter Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont 28. Sie hatte mit Geoffroi de Joinville III mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Felicite von Brienne è nata il nel 1129 nel Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, sua padre, Comte Gautier II de Brienne, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont, aveva 28 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Geoffroi de Joinville III.

ja.lifeSummary: Felicite von Brienneが1129年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアウベバー-スル-セアインで生まれた時，父Comte Gautier II de Brienneは34歳，母Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémontは28歳であった。彼女はGeoffroi de Joinville IIIとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Felicite von Brienne(이)가 1129년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 오브 바-수-세이인에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Comte Gautier II de Brienne(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 Geoffroi de Joinville III(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Felicite von Brienne nasceu em 1129, em Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Comte Gautier II de Brienne, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont, tinha 28 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Geoffroi de Joinville III.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Felicite von Brienne родилась в 1129 г. в местности бар-сур-син, ауб, чампагне-арденн, Франция, её отцу по имени Comte Gautier II de Brienne было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont, 28. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Geoffroi de Joinville III.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Felicite von Brienne nació en 1129, en Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Comte Gautier II de Brienne, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Geoffroi de Joinville III.
